zh.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II是Robert de Varde Sr和Alice Kemp的兒子，於1460年出生在英國諾福爾可科比 卡。他和Anne Copperdick至少有7個兒子。他去世於1506年在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍莫斯費爾德享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可霍莫斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Warde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Cormac, Donal.

variants.name: Ward
meanings: English: occupational name for a watchman or guard, from Middle English ward ‘watchman, guard’ (Old English weard, used as both an agent noun and an abstract noun).
English: occupational name from Middle English warde ‘armed guard’ (Old English weard ‘watching, guarding’), with the same meaning as 1 above.

Irish: shortened form of McWard, an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Bhaird ‘son of the poet’. The surname occurs throughout Ireland, where three different branches of the family are known as professional poets.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II was born in 1460, in Kirby Cane, Norfolk, England as the son of Robert de Varde Sr and Alice Kemp. He had at least 7 sons with Anne Copperdick. He died in 1506, in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II est né en 1460, à Kirby Cane, Norfolk, Angleterre, fils de Robert de Varde Sr et Alice Kemp. Il a eu au moins 7 fils avec Anne Copperdick. Il est décédé en 1506, à Homersfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Homersfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II wurde 1460 in Kirby Cane, Norfolk, England, als Sohn von Robert de Varde Sr und Alice Kemp geboren. Er hatte mit Anne Copperdick mindestens 7 Söhne. Er starb 1506 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Homersfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II è nato il nel 1460 nel Kirby Cane, Norfolk, England come figlio di Robert de Varde Sr e Alice Kemp. Lui avuto almeno 7 figli con Anne Copperdick. Morì nel 1506, nel Homersfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Homersfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Warde IIは1460年にイギリスノーフォルクキルビー ケインでRobert de Varde SrとAlice Kempの息子として生まれた。彼はAnne Copperdickとの間に少なくとも7人の息子をもうけた。彼は1506年にイギリスイギリススフォルクホーメルスフィールドで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクホーメルスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II(은)는 1460년 영국 노르폴크 커비 캔에서 Robert de Varde Sr(와)과 Alice Kemp의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Anne Copperdick(와)과 적어도 일곱 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1506년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홈르스필드에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 홈르스필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II nasceu em 1460, em Kirby Cane, Norfolk, Inglaterra filho de Robert de Varde Sr e Alice Kemp. Ele teve pelo menos 7 filhos com Anne Copperdick. Ele faleceu em 1506, em Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II родился в 1460 г. в местности кирби кан, норфолк, Англия. Его родителей звали Robert de Varde Sr и Alice Kemp. У него было по крайней мере 7 сыновей от Anne Copperdick. Он умер в 1506 г. в местности хомирсфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности хомирсфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Robert Warde II nació en 1460, en Kirby Cane, Norfolk, Inglaterra como hijo de Robert de Varde Sr y Alice Kemp. Tuvo por lo menos 7 hijos con Anne Copperdick. Murió en 1506, en Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Homersfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
